allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "nvm: $\(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"\)"; where.exe node 2>$null; Write-Output "done")

PowerShell($root="C:\\Users\\煮込みカプチーノ\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\RayshiftAcademy"; "--- assets dir contents ---"; if\(Test-Path "$root\\assets"\){ Get-ChildItem "$root\\assets" -Force | Format-Table Name,Length -Auto | Out-String } else { "assets MISSING" }; "--- git tracked in assets ---"; git -C $root ls-files assets/)

PowerShell($root="C:\\Users\\煮込みカプチーノ\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\RayshiftAcademy"; "--- remote ---"; git -C $root remote -v; "--- branch & unpushed ---"; git -C $root status -sb | Select-Object -First 3; "--- 総ファイル数\(追跡\) ---"; \(git -C $root ls-files | Measure-Object\).Count; "--- ファイル種別 ---"; git -C $root ls-files | ForEach-Object { [System.IO.Path]::GetExtension\($_\) } | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object Name,Count)
